intro: As AI adoption accelerates, skilled trades are emerging as a more resilient job market—Toyota and a Huntsville high school are partnering to train students for roles paying $40 per hour that resist automation. The White House approved $9 billion to purchase advanced AI chips for U.S. intelligence agencies, addressing capacity gaps at the CIA and NSA needed to run current models. Claude's latest update integrates with business tools like QuickBooks and HubSpot, enabling users to automate payroll and campaign management within a single interface.

whitelist.title: The White House is asking for $9 billion to buy AI chips for spies.
whitelist.desc: The New York Times reports the CIA and the NSA lack the computing capacity to run the latest AI models.
